summary: The aggregate design, Story, Spec, runtime, test, workflow-state, and conformance surfaces preserve the intended run-session boundary. The CLI remains the outer composition root, run-session modules do not call back into the CLI, only final_prepare may produce current-HEAD pr_ready, and PR creation, merge, waiver, and material external side effects remain explicit human operations. Existing runtime connectors and independent review orchestration are composed and repaired rather than reimplemented.
inspection_summary: Inspected every origin/main...HEAD path; traced the guarded CLI composition into the autonomous safe-action DAG and production runtime/review owners; checked Story/roadmap/predecessor closure metadata, architecture and target model, Spec anchors and test plan, core_workflow_state risk routing, current-head verification artifacts, exact-head focused tests, and target architecture conformance.
judgment_delta: Initial concern: the final closure Story could duplicate the already merged Production Runtime Connectors or Independent Review Orchestration owners -> Final judgment: it reuses createProductionRuntimeConnectors and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner through guarded-run-session composition; predecessor Story edits are closure metadata and focused convergence repairs, not duplicate ownership.

Initial concern: the new one-command owner could violate the run-session module boundary by reaching into CLI/Gate/PR implementation internals -> Final judgment: one-command-pr-ready-closure imports only node:timers/promises, guarded-run-session composes existing owners, and src/cli.js remains the outer dependency root with no run-session import of ./cli.js.

Initial concern: autonomous convergence could silently cross the human authority boundary -> Final judgment: the autonomous registry ends at final_prepare, only that node may emit pr_ready after current-HEAD Gate readiness, and help text, Story, Spec, implementation, and tests consistently exclude PR create, merge, waiver, and material external side effects.

Initial concern: happy-path evidence might omit legacy, fallback, repair, stale-head, cancellation, or artifact output surfaces -> Final judgment: the Spec and test plan cover explicit legacy/disable fallback, provider order and override, needs_changes repair with fresh review, typed stops/resume, cancellation containment, current-HEAD evidence rebind, CLI summary, persisted Run/review/pr-prepare artifacts, and the public E2E replays AC-1 through AC-8.

Initial concern: the new module placement could worsen the target architecture baseline -> Final judgment: exact-head conformance passes with violations reduced from 81 on origin/main to 80 on HEAD, and introduces no run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency.

regression_guard.evidence: Current-head required suite passes 287/287, public runtime E2E passes 5/5, integration/orchestration passes 4/4, typecheck/build pass, focused boundary tests pass 37/37, and explicit legacy/profile/provider fallback paths remain represented.

path_surface_coverage.evidence: All 27 origin/main...HEAD paths plus core_workflow_state, verification, review-request, and conformance artifacts were inspected. Input, fallback, runtime owner, repair, typed-stop, persisted artifact, CLI summary, Gate, and roadmap surfaces are covered without silent suppression.

architecture_observations.core_workflow_state: The risk surface is explicitly targeted by the decision index. The autonomous DAG is diagnose -> prepare_artifacts -> implement -> verify -> review -> repair -> final_prepare, with typed stops and resumable state transitions.
architecture_observations.dependency_direction: src/cli.js composes production dependencies; guarded-run-session and one-command-pr-ready-closure do not import src/cli.js.
architecture_observations.authority_boundary: PR creation, merge, waiver, and material external effects remain outside autonomous execution.
architecture_observations.predecessor_reuse: Production Runtime Connectors and Independent Review Orchestration remain their own merged ownership boundaries and are consumed by the closure Story.
